meta.title: About - ICD-11 Healthcare Platform
meta.description: Learn about the ICD-11 Healthcare Platform - your comprehensive solution for WHO medical code search and classification.

hero.title: About ICD-11
hero.subtitle: Healthcare Platform
hero.description: Empowering healthcare professionals worldwide with instant access to WHO's comprehensive medical classification system.

platformOverview.title: Platform Overview
platformOverview.description: The ICD-11 Healthcare Platform provides healthcare professionals with seamless access to the World Health Organization's International Classification of Diseases, 11th Revision.

features.title: Key Features
items: Comprehensive medical code search with real-time results
Multi-language support for global accessibility
Advanced filtering and flexible search options
Healthcare-grade caching for optimal performance
Professional interface designed for clinical workflows

healthcareApplications.title: Healthcare Applications
healthcareApplications.description: Designed for medical professionals, researchers, and healthcare institutions requiring accurate ICD-11 classification.

useCases.title: Use Cases
items: Clinical documentation and patient record management
Medical research and epidemiological studies
Insurance claims processing and healthcare billing
Public health reporting and statistical analysis
International healthcare data standardization

globalAccessibility.title: Global Accessibility
globalAccessibility.description: Supporting healthcare professionals worldwide with comprehensive internationalization and accessibility features.

languages.title: Supported Languages
languages.description: Available in 6 languages to serve the global healthcare community:
items: English - Primary international language
Spanish - Serving Latin America and Spain
French - Supporting Francophone regions
Arabic - Middle East and North Africa
Chinese - East Asia and Chinese-speaking regions
Russian - Eastern Europe and Central Asia

accessibility.title: Accessibility Features
items: Right-to-Left (RTL) language support for Arabic
High contrast and professional healthcare color palette
Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
Keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility

whoPartnership.title: WHO Partnership
whoPartnership.description: Built in collaboration with World Health Organization standards and utilizing official WHO ICD-11 APIs.

compliance.title: WHO Compliance
items: Direct integration with official WHO ICD-11 API
Real-time synchronization with WHO database updates
Adherence to WHO data classification standards
Respect for WHO intellectual property and usage guidelines

dataSource.title: Official Data Source
dataSource.description: All medical codes and classifications are sourced directly from the World Health Organization's ICD-11 API, ensuring accuracy and up-to-date information.
dataSource.copyright: ICD-11 content is © World Health Organization. All rights reserved.

technicalExcellence.title: Technical Excellence
technicalExcellence.description: Built with modern web technologies and best practices to ensure reliability, performance, and scalability.

frontend.title: Frontend Technologies
items: Next.js 13 - React framework with server-side rendering
TypeScript - Type-safe development environment
Material-UI - Professional healthcare interface components
React Context - Efficient state management

backend.title: Backend Technologies
items: NestJS - Scalable Node.js server framework
TypeScript - Full-stack type safety
Redis - High-performance caching system
OAuth2 - Secure WHO API authentication

performance.title: Performance Features
items: Redis caching for sub-second response times
Optimized API calls with intelligent rate limiting
Progressive web app capabilities
Healthcare-grade reliability and uptime

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join thousands of healthcare professionals using the ICD-11 Healthcare Platform for accurate medical classification.
